title: MaffiaAdventures
description: Try this carefully curated world of Mafia’s best hand-picked mods, where you’re free to become anything you want — build, explore, roleplay as a priest, or just let your imagination take over.
body: This modpack is designed to enhance exploration, building, and progression in Minecraft. It includes improved world generation, new structures, collectible items, and balanced gameplay features that encourage adventure and creativity. The goal is to provide a fun, stable, and immersive experience for both singleplayer and multiplayer worlds.
